focusedGate.description: Paired web/native wheel suspension, tire, and surface evidence gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir advanced-physics-wheels fixture and tools/verify wheel evidence gate
focusedGate.protects: Authored wheel order, exact grounded and surface semantics, registry-toleranced wheel observations, asphalt/ice response, and the non-driven causal control.
focusedGate.reason: A catalog-owned paired runtime trace prevents wheel contracts from advancing on package-local solver tests or single-adapter evidence.

focusedGate.description: Paired web/native deterministic vehicle controller and drivetrain evidence gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir advanced-physics-drivetrain fixture and tools/verify drivetrain evidence gate
focusedGate.protects: Recorded normalized inputs, gear and clutch states, authored-order torque paths, steering/braking/reverse outcomes, assist transitions, differential allocation, and fresh-world retry determinism.
focusedGate.reason: A catalog-owned paired trace prevents drivetrain promotion on package-local tests or a single adapter.

focusedGate.description: Paired web/native deterministic aerodynamics, thrust, control-surface, stall, and wind evidence gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir advanced-physics-aerodynamics fixture and tools/verify aerodynamic evidence gate
focusedGate.protects: Quadratic force semantics, control torque reversal, ordered stall recovery, deterministic wind boundaries, thrust metadata, safety diagnostics, and force telemetry.
focusedGate.reason: A catalog-owned recorded maneuver prevents aerodynamic promotion on package-local tests or a single adapter.

focusedGate.description: Generated procedural scene-mesh LOD selection and cross-adapter visual gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir procedural-mesh-lod fixture and tools/verify generated mesh LOD gate
focusedGate.protects: Compiler-emitted generated mesh LOD variants, exact threshold selection, real web/native mesh swaps, and near/threshold/far silhouette evidence.
focusedGate.reason: A catalog-owned fixture and paired runtime captures prevent trace-only promotion or adapter-specific generated mesh LOD selection drift.

focusedGate.description: Cross-adapter cascaded directional shadow stability gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir fixture catalog and tools/verify shadow cascade stability gate
focusedGate.protects: Exact shared cascade profile resolution and unchanged snapped web light matrices under measured sub-texel camera motion.
focusedGate.reason: Combines paired web/native runtime reports with objective texel-stability evidence that package-local static screenshots cannot prove.

focusedGate.owner: packages/ir fixture catalog and tools/verify contact-shadow gate
focusedGate.protects: Monotonic opacity grounding, static zero steady-state capture cost, bounded dynamic resolution, and nonblank paired web/native evidence.
focusedGate.reason: Combines catalog-owned paired screenshots with adapter observations that package-local tests cannot prove.

focusedGate.description: Cross-adapter volumetric height-fog and shadowed-god-rays gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir fixture catalog and tools/verify volumetrics gate
focusedGate.protects: Altitude fog gradient, shadowed directional shafts, bounded quality, and paired web/native visual evidence.
focusedGate.reason: Combines a tall-column and occluding-pillar scene with region metrics that package-local mapping tests cannot prove.

focusedGate.description: Cross-adapter spatial-temporal SSGI and native approximation gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir fixture catalog and tools/verify SSGI gate
focusedGate.protects: Causal indirect lift, monotone intensity, web red-wall color bleed, native approximation, and no-fallback reports.
focusedGate.reason: Combines disabled/authored/high controls with paired web/native captures and adapter conformance reports.

focusedGate.description: Cross-adapter baked SH probe off-screen bounce gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir fixture catalog and tools/verify baked GI gate
focusedGate.protects: Deterministic baked payloads, stale diagnostics, warm indirect lift, and honest adapter modes.
focusedGate.reason: Pairs disabled/authored web and native captures for an off-screen red-wall alcove.

focusedGate.description: Deterministic web/native composed hero-interior lighting gate.
focusedGate.owner: examples/lumen-lite-showcase and tools/verify lighting showcase gate
focusedGate.protects: Hero-room composition, bounded highlight clipping, warm indirect mids, readable shadows, cross-adapter exposure and contrast, and composed lighting feature reports.
focusedGate.reason: Provides a fast single-scene visual iteration loop while focused capability gates remain the regression tier.

focusedGate.description: Deterministic web/native runtime gameplay primitives gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir gameplay-primitives fixture and tools/verify gameplay-primitives gate
focusedGate.protects: Tag queries, reconciled lifecycle observations, patrol/FSM declarations, and runtime countdown contract coverage.
focusedGate.reason: A shared IR fixture plus host tests catches schema, fixed-tick, and native loader drift before runtime-owned gameplay claims are promoted.

focusedGate.description: Bounded portable tween, camera shake, feedback preset, and world-text gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/ir portable-feedback fixture and tools/verify portable-feedback gate
focusedGate.protects: Shared presentation declarations, bounds, ownership cancellation, seeded timing, and paired web/native proof enrollment.
focusedGate.reason: A shared fixture plus adapter tests catches schema, host facade, timing, and renderer-startup drift before portable feedback claims are promoted.

focusedGate.description: Deterministic bounded project-local script module graph and single-bundle execution gate.
focusedGate.owner: packages/compiler module graph and tools/verify script-local-modules gate
focusedGate.protects: Relative .ts resolution, transitive source hashes, shared helper emission, QuickJS loadability, and the canonical scripts.bundle.js entry.
focusedGate.reason: A multi-file fixture proves that web and native consume the same generated bundle without runtime filesystem imports.
